name: Mark of Sentinel Spells
summary: The people of Keld are human, but they are like no other humans anywhere. Nearly all adults stand over six feet tall, and heights above seven feet are not uncommon. They are massively muscled and have gray skin, ranging from an ashy gray-white to a deeper bluegray. The typical Keldon’s hairline points sharply down in the middle of the forehead and at either temple, but recedes elsewhere — sometimes dramatically. Keldons are remarkably resistant to the cold of their homeland, baring skin even in near-freezing temperatures without discomfort.

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Keldons reach adulthood in their late teens and live less than a century.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Keldons tend toward chaotic alignments, and many walk a fine line between good and evil.

traits.name: Natural Athlete
traits.summary: You have proficiency in the Athletics skill.

traits.name: Keldon Resilience
traits.summary: You have proficiency in Strength saving throws.

traits.name: Icehaven Born
traits.summary: You are naturally adapted to cold climates, as described in chapter 5 of theDungeon Master’s Guide.

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Humans reach adulthood in their late teens and live less than a century.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Humans tend toward no particular alignment.

traits.name: Provincial Origin
traits.summary: Choose one of the four provinces of Innistrad as the place of origin for your character:Gavony,Kessig,Nephalia, orStensia.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Strength score increases by 2, and your Constitution score increases by 1.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Keldons are taller and heavier than the human norms of other cultures, standing almost universally above 6 feet tall and reaching heights above 7 feet. Your size is Medium.

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: Your base walking speed is 30 feet.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common and Keldon.
